summary: Frontend testing of Major UI/UX Overhaul - UnifiedHero and PillarNav components. All features verified working: 1) UnifiedHero displays with dark gradient background (from-[#2D1B4E] via-[#1E3A5F] to-[#0D2137]), 2) Product/Service toggle switch works and navigates between /shop and /services, 3) 'Buying for someone else?' link visible, 4) All 14 pillar buttons have correct emojis (🎂 Celebrate, 🍖 Dine, ✂️ Care, etc.), 5) Pillar buttons have glow effect (shadow-lg + animate-pulse blur) and scale-105 when selected, 6) Services page also has the same UnifiedHero component.

issues: Title shows 'Products for Pet' when no user is logged in - this is acceptable behavior but could show 'Your Pet' instead

critical_code_review_comments: UnifiedHero.jsx correctly implements pillar-specific gradients via PILLAR_GRADIENTS object
PillarNav.jsx implements emoji pillar buttons with glow effect (shadow-lg + animate-pulse blur div)
Product/Service toggle uses navigate() from react-router-dom to switch between /shop and /services
Pillar-specific messages are defined in PillarContext.jsx PILLAR_MESSAGES object
'Buying for someone else?' link has data-testid='shopping-for-other' for testing
All pillar buttons have data-testid='pillar-{id}' pattern for testing
PillarContext.jsx line 218 has ESLint warning about missing 'currentPet' dependency - minor issue
test_credentials: aditya / lola4304 (has pet Meister - Shih Tzu) - Note: login could not be fully tested due to browser automation issues
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major UI/UX overhaul verified working without login. Features confirmed: UnifiedHero with dark gradient, Product/Service toggle navigating correctly, all 14 pillar buttons with emojis and glow effects, 'Buying for someone else?' link visible. To fully test pillar-specific Mira messages (birthday for Celebrate, treats for Dine, etc.), login is required.

pillar_selection_changes_products.example: Clicking Care shows 332 products, Clicking Celebrate shows 1240 products

examples.tagline: Make every moment with Your Pet unforgettable
Premium grooming & care for Your Pet

unable_to_test.pillar_specific_mira_messages: Requires login to see personalized messages like 'Is it almost Meister's birthday?' for Celebrate pillar
unable_to_test.pet_soul_percentage_in_hero: Requires login to see Pet Soul™ percentage badge
unable_to_test.pet_photo_in_hero: Requires login to see pet photo with SoulScoreArc
